how to stop this process?

# ps -axww | grep ls

/var/db/mysql /var/db/mysql/ibdata /var/db/mysql/iblogs /www /dev/null
-type f ( -perm -u+x -or -perm -g+x -or -perm -o+x ) ( -perm -u+s -or
-perm -g+s ) -exec ls -liTd {} +
